author: alice@example.com
message: Fix refund amount validation for partial refunds
diff_summary: Modified _validate_refund_amount to compare against remaining refundable amount instead of original order total. Added unit test for partial refund edge case.

author: bob@example.com
message: Add async refund processing with timeout
diff_summary: Wrapped payment_service.process_refund call in asyncio.wait_for with 5s timeout. Resolves cancellation timeout under load.

author: alice@example.com
diff_summary: Extracted PaymentGateway as separate class. process_payment and process_refund now delegate to gateway.charge / gateway.submit_refund. No behavioral change intended.

author: carol@example.com
message: Add optimistic locking to inventory stock updates
diff_summary: Added version column check to reserve_stock and release_stock. Prevents race condition observed during flash sales.

author: bob@example.com
message: Add input validation helpers (currency, amount, customer_id)
diff_summary: New validators module with validate_currency, validate_positive_amount, validate_customer_id. Wired into OrderService.create_order and PaymentService.process_payment.

author: alice@example.com
message: Add RefundEndpoint for external refund API
diff_summary: New REST endpoint POST /refunds. Calls OrderService.get_order then PaymentService.process_refund. Note: integration tests not added in this PR.

author: carol@example.com
message: Tighten cancel_order: validate state before refund
diff_summary: cancel_order now checks order.is_cancellable() before triggering refund and inventory release. Raises ValueError on invalid state.

author: bob@example.com
diff_summary: OrderService with create_order, pay_order, cancel_order. Coordinates between InventoryService and PaymentService.
